output.root_cause: n8n webhook endpoint /webhook/sam-ingest returning 502 errors intermittently. Root cause: memory pressure on n8n container causing garbage collection pauses exceeding health check timeout. Container restart resolves temporarily but OOM recurs under sustained ingest load.
output.recommended_fix: Increase n8n container memory limit from 512MB to 1GB in docker-compose.yml. Monitor with 'docker stats' after change. If issue persists, implement batch-size throttling in SAM ingest workflow to reduce peak memory usage.
